distinct_id.description: User distinct ID to test against (mutually exclusive with person_id)

groups.description: Groups for feature flag evaluation (JSON object, defaults to empty dict)

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature flag.

person_id.description: Person ID to test against (mutually exclusive with distinct_id)

timestamp.description: Optional point-in-time to evaluate the flag against — both flag conditions and person properties are reconstructed as they existed at that timestamp. ISO 8601 with timezone, e.g. ``2026-04-29T15:30:00Z`` or ``2026-04-29T15:30:00+00:00``. Naive timestamps (no timezone) are interpreted as UTC.
